title: Grammitis trifurcata
taxonomy: Grammitis trifurcata is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Grammitis, which consists of small ferns commonly known as basket ferns or lip ferns. Grammitis trifurcata is native to tropical regions of Central and South America and the Caribbean. The classification of Grammitis trifurcata follows the APG IV system, which places it in the division Pteridophyta. Grammitis trifurcata is also known by its synonym, Grammitis trifurcata var. trifurcata.
uses: Grammitis trifurcata is a species of fern that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties. In some parts of the world, it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
